name: Cass Hamada (Big Hero 6)
description:
Cass is a supporting character in the Big Hero 6 franchise. She is the hard-working and supportive loving aunt of Hiro Hamada and the late Tadashi Hamada, as well as the owner of the Lucky Cat Café.

Background

Cass is a relative of Hiro and Tadashi's parents. Since her youth, she has lived in San Fransokyo and was friends with Diego Cruz, frequently visiting Joe's Diner with him until one day Cruz moved out of town. During her college days, Cass played softball and became quite athletic due to it.

Following the death of Hiro and Tadashi's parents when Hiro was only 3 years old, Cass became the children's guardian and took them into her care. The three of them lived in Lucky Cat Café where Cass also worked, and some time when Hiro was still a toddler, Cass got a new cat who was named Mochi.

For the following ten years, Cass raised both of her nephews as best as she could despite admitting she lacked parenting knowledge and often worrying about not doing a good job, though both Tadashi and Hiro assured her otherwise.

Official Description

Cass is the overworked but always-supportive guardian of brothers Hiro and Tadashi. The owner of a popular San Fransokyo bakery and coffee shop, Aunt Cass is proud, ebullient and thinks the world of her two genius nephews. She's always good for a laugh and ready with a hug, tirelessly there for support and a great home-cooked meal.
